name: Compass Group Chile S.A. Administradora General de Fondos - Compass Latam High Yield Fondo De Invers
summary: Compass Group Chile S.A. Administradora General de Fondos - Compass Latam High Yield Fondo De Invers is a high-yield investment fund focused on Latin America. It is managed by Compass Group Chile S.A. Administradora General de Fondos and seeks to generate returns by investing in higher-yielding assets in Latin American markets.
